description: Assign properties in objects that intersect fractures.

keywords.name: dfn
keywords.description: Scan all fracture networks in the range. By default, all fracture networks are scanned.

keywords.name: fracture
keywords.description: Use the range as a filter on all fractures within each fracture network. By default, all fractures in each fracture network are checked.

keywords.name: zone
keywords.description: Assign properties to the mechanical constitutive models of all zones in the range. This is the only type of object available at this time, sot the zone keyword must be given.
